# WDU CMS - VIBE CODING SYSTEM ARCHITECT

## ROLE
You are a Lead Fullstack Developer. Your task is to build a professional CMS for Wahana Data Utama (WDU).

## TECH STACK
- Backend: Node.js, Express, TypeScript, Prisma (PostgreSQL).
- Frontend: Next.js 14 (App Router), Tailwind CSS.
- Assets: Lucide React or Material Symbols.

## DATA ARCHITECTURE
Use the `schema.prisma` provided to build dynamic CRUD endpoints. 
- GET `/api/landing`: Returns a combined object of GlobalContent, Services, Gallery, and Testimonials.
- POST `/api/admin/update`: Updates specific sections.

## FRONTEND REFACTORING REQUIREMENTS
1. **Componentization**: Split the provided static HTML into:
   - `Navbar.tsx`: Transparent glass header.
   - `Hero.tsx`: Main section with dynamic headline.
   - `Services.tsx`: Grid of 3 service cards from DB.
   - `Gallery.tsx`: NEW section. Use a Masonry Grid for images from the DB.
   - `About.tsx`: Content with the "18+ years" stats.
   - `Testimonials.tsx`: Overlapping cards layout from HTML.
   - `Footer.tsx`: Dynamic contact info.

2. **Data Fetching**: Use Server Components for the public landing page. Use Client Components for the `/admin` dashboard.

3. **Fidelity**: YOU MUST MATCH THE CSS CLASSES exactly as provided in the source HTML (glass, hero-blob, mesh-gradient, etc).

## NEW FEATURE: THE GALLERY
- Create a `Gallery.tsx` component.
- Visuals: Rectangular cards with subtle hover-scale effects.
- Source: Data from `prisma.gallery`.

## SOURCE HTML (CONTEXT)
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Wahana Data Utama | Transforming Data</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&amp;family=Sora:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        "primary": "#6ab149", 
                        "secondary": "#2d8bc9", 
                        "background-light": "#ffffff",
                        "background-alt": "#f8fafc",
                        "accent-dark": "#0f172a"
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        "display": ["Plus Jakarta Sans", "sans-serif"],
                        "body": ["Sora", "sans-serif"]
                    },
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.375rem", "lg": "0.75rem", "xl": "1.25rem", "2xl": "1.5rem", "3xl": "2.5rem", "full": "9999px"},
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; }
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; }

        .glass {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45);
            backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.07);
        }
        .glass-header {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
            backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(106, 177, 73, 0.1);
        }
        .data-grid-bg {
            background-image: 
                radial-gradient(circle at 2px 2px, rgba(106, 177, 73, 0.05) 1px, transparent 0);
            background-size: 40px 40px;
        }
        .mesh-gradient {
            background: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, hsla(102, 42%, 49%, 0.15) 0, transparent 50%), 
                        radial-gradient(at 50% 0%, hsla(203, 64%, 48%, 0.1) 0, transparent 50%), 
                        radial-gradient(at 100% 0%, hsla(102, 42%, 49%, 0.15) 0, transparent 50%);
        }
        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #6ab149 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }
        .hero-blob {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(106, 177, 73, 0.15) 0%, rgba(45, 139, 201, 0.1) 100%);
            filter: blur(80px);
            animation: blob-float 20s infinite alternate;
        }
        @keyframes blob-float {
            from { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
            to { transform: translate(50px, 100px) scale(1.1); }
        }
        .btn-futuristic-primary {
            background: #0f172a;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
        .btn-futuristic-primary::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: -100%;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.2), transparent);
            transition: 0.5s;
        }
        .btn-futuristic-primary:hover::after {
            left: 100%;
        }
        .btn-futuristic-primary:hover {
            background: #6ab149;
            transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.02);
            box-shadow: 0 15px 30px -10px rgba(106, 177, 73, 0.4);
        }
        .btn-futuristic-secondary {
            background: white;
            border: 1.5px solid #0f172a;
            transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
        .btn-futuristic-secondary:hover {
            background: #0f172a;
            color: white;
            transform: translateY(-3px);
        }
        .marquee-container {
            mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, black 10%, black 90%, transparent);
        }
        .floating-ui {
            animation: float 6s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        @keyframes float {
            0% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-20px); }
            100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background-light text-slate-700 overflow-x-hidden antialiased selection:bg-primary/30">
<!-- Header -->
<header class="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 glass-header">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-20 flex items-center justify-between">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="h-10 w-auto">
<img alt="Wahana Data Utama Logo" class="h-full w-auto object-contain" src="data:image/png;base64,"/>
</div>
<h2 class="text-lg font-extrabold tracking-tight text-accent-dark uppercase">Wahana <span class="text-primary">Data</span> Utama</h2>
</div>
<nav class="hidden lg:flex items-center gap-10">
<a class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-600 hover:text-primary transition-all relative group" href="#">
                Beranda
                <span class="absolute -bottom-1 left-0 w-0 h-0.5 bg-primary group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-300"></span>
</a>
<a class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-600 hover:text-primary transition-all relative group" href="#">
                Layanan
                <span class="absolute -bottom-1 left-0 w-0 h-0.5 bg-primary group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-300"></span>
</a>
<a class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-600 hover:text-primary transition-all relative group" href="#">
                Tentang Kami
                <span class="absolute -bottom-1 left-0 w-0 h-0.5 bg-primary group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-300"></span>
</a>
<a class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-600 hover:text-primary transition-all relative group" href="#">
                Portfolio
                <span class="absolute -bottom-1 left-0 w-0 h-0.5 bg-primary group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-300"></span>
</a>
<a class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-600 hover:text-primary transition-all relative group" href="#">
                Kontak
                <span class="absolute -bottom-1 left-0 w-0 h-0.5 bg-primary group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-300"></span>
</a>
</nav>
<button class="btn-futuristic-primary text-white px-7 py-3 rounded-full text-xs font-black tracking-widest uppercase shadow-lg">
            Mulai Proyek
        </button>
</div>
</header>
<!-- Hero Section -->
<section class="relative min-h-screen flex items-center pt-24 pb-20 overflow-hidden mesh-gradient">
<div class="absolute inset-0 data-grid-bg opacity-30"></div>
<div class="absolute top-20 -right-40 w-[45rem] h-[45rem] hero-blob rounded-full"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-0 -left-40 w-[40rem] h-[40rem] hero-blob rounded-full opacity-40"></div>
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10 w-full">
<div class="max-w-4xl">
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-2 rounded-full bg-white/50 border border-primary/20 backdrop-blur-md text-primary text-[10px] font-black tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-10 shadow-sm">
<span class="relative flex h-2 w-2">
<span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-primary opacity-75"></span>
<span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-primary"></span>
</span>
                Next-Gen Data Architecture
            </div>
<h1 class="text-6xl md:text-8xl lg:text-[7.5rem] font-extrabold text-accent-dark leading-[0.95] tracking-tighter mb-10">
                Data is <br/><span class="gradient-text italic">Dynamic.</span>
</h1>
<p class="text-xl lg:text-2xl text-slate-500 leading-relaxed mb-12 max-w-2xl font-light">
                Wahana Data Utama architects intelligence. We bridge the gap between complex raw data and high-velocity business growth.
            </p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap gap-6 items-center">
<button class="btn-futuristic-primary text-white px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-3 group">
                    Our Ecosystem
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-xl group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">bolt</span>
</button>
<button class="btn-futuristic-secondary text-accent-dark px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Contact Specialist
                </button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Floating Asymmetrical Decoration -->
<div class="hidden xl:block absolute right-20 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-1/3">
<div class="relative h-[600px] w-full">
<div class="glass absolute top-0 left-10 p-8 rounded-3xl w-64 floating-ui" style="animation-delay: -1s;">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">analytics</span>
</div>
<div class="h-2 w-24 bg-slate-200 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
<div class="space-y-2">
<div class="h-2 w-full bg-slate-100 rounded-full"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-4/5 bg-slate-100 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="glass absolute bottom-20 right-0 p-10 rounded-[40px] w-72 floating-ui" style="animation-delay: -3s;">
<div class="text-4xl font-black text-primary mb-2">99%</div>
<div class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Accuracy Rate</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Key Services -->
<section class="py-32 relative bg-slate-50/30 overflow-hidden">
<!-- Asymmetrical Grid Background Element -->
<div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-1/2 h-full opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none">
<div class="grid grid-cols-6 h-full gap-4">
<div class="border-l border-accent-dark h-full"></div>
<div class="border-l border-accent-dark h-full"></div>
<div class="border-l border-accent-dark h-full"></div>
<div class="border-l border-accent-dark h-full"></div>
<div class="border-l border-accent-dark h-full"></div>
<div class="border-l border-accent-dark h-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start mb-24 gap-12">
<div class="max-w-2xl">
<h2 class="text-primary font-black tracking-[0.4em] uppercase text-[10px] mb-6">Technological Pillars</h2>
<h3 class="text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold text-accent-dark leading-[1.1] tracking-tighter">
                    Solutions for the <br/><span class="text-primary italic">Algorithm Age.</span>
</h3>
</div>
<div class="md:w-72 pt-10">
<p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed border-t border-slate-200 pt-6">
                    Redefining traditional research with real-time predictive modeling.
                </p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-10">
<!-- Service 1 -->
<div class="glass p-12 rounded-[3rem] group hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-700 hover:-translate-y-4 hover:shadow-primary/10">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-accent-dark rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center text-primary mb-12 group-hover:rotate-[15deg] transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">query_stats</span>
</div>
<h4 class="text-3xl font-extrabold mb-6 text-accent-dark">Neural Research</h4>
<p class="text-slate-500 mb-10 leading-relaxed font-medium">
                    AI-driven consumer behavioral analysis that maps psychological drivers and market shifts before they happen.
                </p>
<div class="w-12 h-1 bg-primary/20 mb-8 group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-700"></div>
<a class="inline-flex items-center gap-3 text-accent-dark font-black uppercase text-xs tracking-widest group/link" href="#">
<span>System Architecture</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm group-hover/link:translate-x-1 transition-transform">trending_flat</span>
</a>
</div>
<!-- Service 2 -->
<div class="glass p-12 rounded-[3rem] group hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-700 hover:-translate-y-4 hover:shadow-primary/10 bg-white/60">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-primary rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center text-white mb-12 group-hover:rotate-[-15deg] transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">dynamic_feed</span>
</div>
<h4 class="text-3xl font-extrabold mb-6 text-accent-dark">Velocity Insights</h4>
<p class="text-slate-500 mb-10 leading-relaxed font-medium">
                    Real-time data streaming and visualization engines that convert high-velocity data points into surgical actions.
                </p>
<div class="w-12 h-1 bg-primary/20 mb-8 group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-700"></div>
<a class="inline-flex items-center gap-3 text-primary font-black uppercase text-xs tracking-widest group/link" href="#">
<span>Actionable Intelligence</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm group-hover/link:translate-x-1 transition-transform">trending_flat</span>
</a>
</div>
<!-- Service 3 -->
<div class="glass p-12 rounded-[3rem] group hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-700 hover:-translate-y-4 hover:shadow-primary/10">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-accent-dark rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center text-primary mb-12 group-hover:rotate-[15deg] transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">cloud_sync</span>
</div>
<h4 class="text-3xl font-extrabold mb-6 text-accent-dark">Core Infrastructure</h4>
<p class="text-slate-500 mb-10 leading-relaxed font-medium">
                    Building robust, infinitely scalable IT backbones designed to withstand the data demands of the next decade.
                </p>
<div class="w-12 h-1 bg-primary/20 mb-8 group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-700"></div>
<a class="inline-flex items-center gap-3 text-accent-dark font-black uppercase text-xs tracking-widest group/link" href="#">
<span>View Engineering</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm group-hover/link:translate-x-1 transition-transform">trending_flat</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- About Section -->
<section class="py-32 bg-white relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute -top-20 -right-20 w-96 h-96 bg-primary/5 rounded-full blur-[100px]"></div>
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-center gap-24">
<div class="lg:w-1/2 relative">
<div class="absolute -inset-10 bg-primary/5 rounded-[4rem] -rotate-3"></div>
<div class="relative aspect-[4/5] rounded-[3rem] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl border-4 border-white">
<img alt="Strategic Vision" class="w-full h-full object-cover grayscale transition-all duration-1000 hover:grayscale-0 hover:scale-105" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDWx-ohTYzay4u5Hf1OxWncK-U84yS84853KgJMYPUeqO4JmnKYfOjjrnhhJnMuK2H2tFIL3_jduB0i0I6fSqs2W02rcl1Fz4RE9lFbtTLnLwWlfcOL-rebzKkydrO8-dC0Fc_3Pv3Axuw-8qf2RG5BCXCXpiWgnmnPisjvL77L9eeeV36AtqYBIHy0Oqa4jiNyoBH9p4zBSVP24h0w7twZHhjHhybslqLAkDj_yNBiuxRtsr1ydC8btpSaDminerCCaSIHLqrsH9dP"/>
</div>
<div class="absolute -bottom-10 -left-10 glass p-10 rounded-3xl border border-white shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-2xl">
<p class="text-5xl font-black text-accent-dark mb-1">20</p>
<p class="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-primary">Years of Evolution</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="lg:w-1/2">
<h2 class="text-primary font-black tracking-[0.4em] uppercase text-[10px] mb-6">Our DNA</h2>
<h3 class="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold mb-10 text-accent-dark leading-[1.1] tracking-tighter">Human Intuition. <br/>Machine Precision.</h3>
<p class="text-xl text-slate-500 mb-12 leading-relaxed font-light">
                    Founded in 2006, we've evolved from a research powerhouse into a digital transformation catalyst. We understand that data isn't just numbers—it's the pulse of your future enterprise.
                </p>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-8 mb-12">
<div class="p-8 rounded-3xl bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-white flex items-center justify-center text-primary mb-6 shadow-sm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">rocket_launch</span>
</div>
<h5 class="text-lg font-extrabold text-accent-dark mb-3">Exponential Scale</h5>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">Infrastructure that grows as fast as your ambitions.</p>
</div>
<div class="p-8 rounded-3xl bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-white flex items-center justify-center text-primary mb-6 shadow-sm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">security</span>
</div>
<h5 class="text-lg font-extrabold text-accent-dark mb-3">Enterprise Trust</h5>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">Securing national-level data streams for nearly two decades.</p>
</div>
</div>
<button class="inline-flex items-center gap-3 group text-accent-dark font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-xs transition-all hover:gap-6">
                    Discovery Deep-Dive
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary group-hover:translate-x-2 transition-transform">arrow_forward</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Testimonials Section - NEW Dynamic Layout -->
<section class="py-32 bg-accent-dark overflow-hidden relative">
<div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full opacity-10 pointer-events-none">
<div class="absolute top-1/4 -left-20 w-96 h-96 bg-primary rounded-full blur-[120px]"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-1/4 -right-20 w-96 h-96 bg-secondary rounded-full blur-[120px]"></div>
</div>
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
<div class="text-center mb-20">
<h2 class="text-primary font-black tracking-[0.4em] uppercase text-[10px] mb-6">Partnership Echoes</h2>
<h3 class="text-4xl md:text-6xl font-extrabold text-white tracking-tighter">Voices of Transformation.</h3>
</div>
<!-- Overlapping Cards Layout -->
<div class="relative max-w-5xl mx-auto h-[500px] mt-10">
<!-- Card 1 -->
<div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full md:w-[450px] bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 p-10 rounded-[2.5rem] transform hover:-translate-y-4 transition-all duration-500 z-10">
<div class="flex gap-1 text-primary mb-8">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
</div>
<p class="text-lg text-white font-medium italic mb-10 leading-relaxed">
                    "Wahana Data Utama redefined how we approach national statistics. Their precision is unparalleled in the industry."
                </p>
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-slate-800 flex items-center justify-center text-primary font-bold">BK</div>
<div>
<p class="text-white font-bold text-sm">Bambang Kusuma</p>
<p class="text-primary text-[10px] uppercase font-black tracking-widest">Director, Ministry of Finance</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Card 2 -->
<div class="absolute top-20 right-0 w-full md:w-[450px] bg-white p-12 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl transform hover:-translate-y-4 transition-all duration-500 z-20">
<div class="flex gap-1 text-primary mb-8">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-current">star</span>
</div>
<p class="text-xl text-accent-dark font-extrabold italic mb-10 leading-relaxed">
                    "They don't just deliver reports; they deliver roadmaps to the future. Our growth spiked 40% after implementing their insights."
                </p>
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center text-primary font-bold">AS</div>
<div>
<p class="text-accent-dark font-bold text-sm">Amanda Suherman</p>
<p class="text-slate-400 text-[10px] uppercase font-black tracking-widest">CEO, DigiFlow Asia</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Card 3 (Mobile Hidden/Table Bottom) -->
<div class="absolute bottom-0 left-1/4 w-full md:w-[400px] bg-primary p-10 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl hidden md:block transform hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-500 z-30">
<p class="text-white font-black text-2xl mb-4 italic">"True technological partners."</p>
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<p class="text-white/80 text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">Digital Strategist, Bank Central</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Trust Indicators -->
<section class="py-24 border-y border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/80">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
<p class="text-center text-slate-400 text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.5em] mb-16">Global Standard Partnerships</p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center items-center gap-16 md:gap-28 opacity-30 grayscale hover:grayscale-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-1000">
<div class="h-8 md:h-12 w-auto">

</div>
</section>
<!-- Footer -->
<footer class="bg-accent-dark text-slate-400 py-24 relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-16 mb-20">
<div class="md:col-span-5">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-10">
<div class="h-10 w-auto">
<img alt="Wahana Data Utama Logo" class="h-full w-auto brightness-0 invert" src="data:image/png;base64,"/>
</div>
<h2 class="text-xl font-black tracking-tight text-white uppercase italic">Wahana <span class="text-primary">Data</span> Utama</h2>
</div>
<p class="text-lg leading-relaxed mb-10 text-slate-400 font-light max-w-md">
                    Architecting the future of intelligence through sustainable data-driven ecosystems since 2006.
                </p>
<div class="flex gap-5">
<a class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all duration-500 border border-white/10" href="#">
<svg class="w-6 h-6 fill-current" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"></path></svg>
</a>
<a class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all duration-500 border border-white/10" href="#">
<svg class="w-6 h-6 fill-current" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19.615 3.184c-3.604-.246-11.631-.245-15.23 0-3.897.266-4.356 2.62-4.385 8.816.029 6.185.484 8.549 4.385 8.816 3.6.245 11.626.246 15.23 0 3.897-.266 4.356-2.62 4.385-8.816-.029-6.185-.484-8.549-4.385-8.816zm-10.615 12.816v-8l8 3.993-8 4.007z"></path></svg>
</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="md:col-span-2">
<h4 class="text-white font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] mb-10">Protocols</h4>
<ul class="space-y-5 text-sm font-bold">
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        Neural Research
                    </a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        Velocity Insights
                    </a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        Core Infrastructure
                    </a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        Predictive Modeling
                    </a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="md:col-span-2">
<h4 class="text-white font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] mb-10">Entity</h4>
<ul class="space-y-5 text-sm font-bold">
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        The Nexus
                    </a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        Project Archives
                    </a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        Career Sync
                    </a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center gap-2 group" href="#">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-primary/20 group-hover:bg-primary rounded-full transition-all"></span>
                        Establish Link
                    </a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="md:col-span-3">
<h4 class="text-white font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] mb-10">Access Points</h4>
<ul class="space-y-6 text-sm">
<li class="flex items-start gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl">location_on</span>
<span class="leading-relaxed font-bold">SCBD Sector 7, Jakarta Digital District,<br/>ID 12190</span>
</li>
<li class="flex items-center gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl">terminal</span>
<span class="font-bold">uplink@wahanadata.tech</span>
</li>
<li class="flex items-center gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl">sensors</span>
<span class="font-bold">+62 (21) 1234 5678</span>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pt-12 border-t border-white/5 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-8 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.4em]">
<p>© 2024 Wahana Data Utama Nexus. ALL SYSTEMS NOMINAL.</p>
<div class="flex gap-12">
<a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="#">Encryption Policy</a>
<a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="#">Operational Terms</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</footer>
</body></html>

## EXECUTION STEP 1
Begin by creating the Backend Express structure:
1. `backend/src/config/prisma.ts` (Prisma client export).
2. `backend/src/controllers/contentController.ts` (Get/Update logic).
3. `backend/src/routes/contentRoutes.ts`.
4. Implement error handling middleware.

## EXECUTION STEP 2
Refactor the Frontend:
1. Setup `frontend/src/lib/api.ts` to fetch from backend.
2. Create the components one by one, ensuring they are responsive.
